description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. Add a lint job (named lint) in the test stage that runs the before_script "npm install" and then executes "npm run lint". Add a build job (named build) in the build stage that also runs the before_script "npm install" followed by "npm run build". No specific rules, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are configured.
